series_metadata.series_title: Job Training Partnership of Ohio Grants
series_metadata.series_description: Filed by Service Delivery Area (SDA) number. File includes plan, correspondence, request for equipment purchase, close-out packages,and audit report. Also includes descriptive information for all subgrants. Includes all expenditures, accruals and financial activities related to the individual subgrants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years from the date of obligation of funds then transfer to the Records Center. Retain 1 year at the Records Center and until state and federal audit reports are released, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from date of obligation of funds and until state and federal audit reports are released, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
